---
title: "Course Archive"
---

A complete list of courses and workshops I have taught from Fall 2017 onward. Each course has its own GitHub-hosted site with syllabus, lecture materials, and (where available) recordings and code.

## 2026

- **Spring 2026** — [Multivariate Modeling](https://jonathantemplin.github.io/Multivariate-Modeling-Spring-2026/) (EDF 9780, Clemson University)

## 2025

- **Fall 2025** — [Structural Equation Modeling](https://jonathantemplin.github.io/Structural-Equation-Modeling-Fall-2025/) (PSQF 6249, University of Iowa)
- **Summer 2025** — [Multilevel Measurement Models Workshop](https://jonathantemplin.github.io/MultilevelMeasurementModels2025/)
- **Spring 2025** — [Missing Data Methods](https://jonathantemplin.github.io/MissingDataMethods2025/) (PSQF 7375, University of Iowa)

## 2024

- **Fall 2024** — [Bayesian Psychometric Modeling](https://jonathantemplin.github.io/Bayesian-Psychometric-Modeling-Course-Fall-2024/) (PSQF 7375, University of Iowa)

## 2023

- **Fall 2023** — [Multidimensional Measurement Models](https://github.com/jonathantemplin/MultidimensionalMeasurementModels2023) (PSQF 7375, University of Iowa)
- **Summer 2023** — [Multilevel Measurement Models Workshop](https://github.com/jonathantemplin/mlmmWorkshop2023)

## 2022

- **Fall 2022** — [Bayesian Psychometric Modeling](https://github.com/jonathantemplin/Bayesian-Psychometric-Modeling-Course-Fall2022) (PSQF 7375, University of Iowa)

## 2019

- **Spring 2019** — [Bayesian Psychometric Modeling](https://github.com/jonathantemplin/BayesianPsychometricModeling) (PSQF 7375, University of Iowa)

## 2018

- **Spring 2018** — [Fundamentals of Multivariate Modeling](https://jonathantemplin.github.io/Multivariate-Modeling-Spring-2018/) (EPSY 905, University of Kansas)

## 2017

- **Fall 2017** — [Latent Trait Measurement and Structural Equation Modeling](https://jonathantemplin.github.io/Latent-Trait-Measurement-SEM-Fall-2017/) (EPSY 906, University of Kansas)

---

For older courses (pre-2017), please contact me directly.
